name: Harbor Master Len
greeting: Welcome to the harbor, traveller. Ships leave regularly for the outer islands.

name: Suspicious Lookout
greeting: What're you staring at, eh?

name: Old Fisher Bram
greeting: Forty years I've fished these waters. Strange creatures out there lately...

name: Captured Orc
greeting: You free me? I tell you where boss is!

name: Forest Hermit
greeting: Lost, are you? This maze has claimed many souls.

name: Lake Spirit
greeting: The serpent that guards these waters must be calmed before peace returns.

name: Scholar Elenor
greeting: I study the ancient ruins. There is something buried beneath the rubble...

name: Retired Mine Foreman
greeting: These tunnels haven't been worked in decades. Strange things moved in.

name: Father Aldric
greeting: Bless you, child. The dead walk in the graveyard. We need a brave soul.

name: Ghost of Lily
greeting: I can't find my mum... Can you help me?

name: Barkeep Moira
greeting: What'll it be? We've the best ale this side of the harbor.

name: Bank Manager Fitch
greeting: All coins are safe with us. Interest rates are quite competitive.

name: Postmistress Hanne
greeting: Mail from the islands arrives every Tuesday. Anything I can help with?

name: Guildmaster Sword
greeting: Welcome to the Adventurer's Guild. We have quests for those brave enough.

name: Principal Oaks
greeting: This school is for all young minds of the island. Learning is power!

name: Teacher Miriam
greeting: Class is in session. We're studying island history today.

name: Librarian Goode
greeting: Shh... Please keep your voice down. The books don't appreciate noise.

name: Innkeeper Bess
greeting: Room and board available. Best stew on the road!

name: Dragon Watcher Fen
greeting: I've seen it — enormous wings, scales like black iron. The cave is north.

name: MUD System Operator
greeting: Nemesis is online and accepting connections. May your adventures be legendary.

name: Elder Crow
greeting: Our island has been troubled by pirates. Will you help us?

name: Jungle Shaman
greeting: The great serpent is angry. Only a brave warrior can calm it.

name: Forge Master Keil
greeting: The volcano's treasure is guarded by fire creatures. Strong weapons needed.

name: Mist Oracle
greeting: The mist hides truths. Only the pure of heart may see through it.

name: Captain Rowan
greeting: Storm bears are terrorising our fishing. We need them driven off.

name: Pearl Diver Sera
greeting: The sea turtles are nesting and can not be disturbed. Something is threatening them.

name: Ash Miner Dorn
greeting: The ash golems have taken over the old mine. We need them cleared.

name: Friendly Ghost
greeting: Not all of us are dangerous. Some of us just want to go home.

name: Swamp Villager
greeting: The Bog Horror rises every decade. It is time again...

name: Market Keeper Ned
greeting: Best prices in the whole island! Step right up!
